title: Beauty Water
tmdbOverview: Beauty Water looks like a common skin cosmetic. But unlike other cosmetics, people can sculpt their skin with it like molding clay and change their appearance. An ordinary girl, Yaeji, comes across the 'Beauty Water' by chance, and her endless desire to be the most beautiful woman brings her unimaginable disaster.
synopsis: Released in 2020, Beauty Water is a animation, drama and horror film from South Korea. It carries a 6.1 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 16 certification (DE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
